supply_chain.dependencies: We have a diverse set of suppliers to help us develop, maintain, and troubleshoot products and services such as wireless and wireline network components, software development services, and billing and customer service support. In certain areas such as billing services, voice, and data communications transport services, wireless or wireline network infrastructure equipment, handsets, other devices, back-office processes and payment processing, there are a limited number of suppliers who can provide adequate support for us.
risks: Limited number of suppliers in certain critical areas (billing, network infrastructure, handsets, payment processing)
Supplier failures or service degradation during transitions
Economic, financial and credit conditions affecting suppliers
Natural catastrophic events (earthquakes, floods, hurricanes, storms, heatwaves, fires)
Energy shortages and power outages at suppliers
Terrorist attacks or hostile acts affecting suppliers

regulatory_risks: FCC licensing, construction, operation and use of network regulations
FCC rules on 911, 988 and E-911 services
Telephone number porting regulations
Interconnection and roaming regulations
Internet openness or net neutrality regulations
Robocalling/robotexting regulations
Disabilities access requirements
Privacy and cybersecurity regulations
Digital discrimination regulations
Consumer protection regulations
Universal service and Lifeline program requirements
Spectrum license renewal and revocation risks
FCC authority to modify rules related to use of licensed spectrum
Foreign ownership limitations (20% direct, 25% indirect ownership limits)

State and local government regulations on billing, termination, early termination fees, advertising, network outages, device use while driving, service mapping, consumer information protection, zoning and land use
State-specific net neutrality requirements
State privacy laws (including California privacy legislation)
State broadband rate-setting laws (e.g., New York)
FTC jurisdiction over consumer protection and anticompetitive practices
Federal Aviation Administration regulations on tower siting, lighting and construction
Environmental and historic preservation regulations
Federal Universal Service Fund and state USF fees
Income tax laws and regulations changes
AI-related laws and regulations (evolving and varying by jurisdiction)
Data privacy laws (CCPA and similar state laws)

Government commitments from Merger approval (5G network build-out, high-speed wireless service delivery, in-home broadband product marketing, national security, pricing, service, employment, diversity support)
FCC enforcement actions and fines for regulatory violations
Potential FCC penalties for spectrum license non-compliance
Section 13(r) of the Exchange Act disclosure requirements for Iran-related activities

sanction_risks: Iran sanctions compliance (through DT and SoftBank affiliates)
Telecommunications services to Embassy of Iran (through DT and SoftBank subsidiaries)
Roaming and interconnection with Iranian telecom providers (through DT subsidiaries)
Services to entities on OFAC Specially Designated Nationals list (through DT subsidiaries)
Geopolitical instability impacts including Ukraine-Russia and Israel-Hamas wars
